admin.key_help: Paste the key from your linkrobins.com dashboard → Warble. That's it — Warble sets up the Realtime extension's connection for you automatically. After you save, realtime can take up to a minute to activate. Leave it blank to disconnect.
admin.paste_key: Paste your Warble key below to turn on realtime. Get it from your linkrobins.com dashboard → Warble.
admin.connected: ✓ Connected — realtime is set up on your forum. It can take up to a minute to activate, so if new replies aren't appearing live right away, give it a moment. Tip: open the Realtime extension's settings to tune typing indicators, discussion-list updates, and notification toasts for your community.
admin.need_realtime: Warble needs the "Realtime" extension. Install and enable flarum/realtime, then paste your Warble key below — Warble does the rest.
admin.write_failed: Warble couldn't save the connection to your forum's config.php — it isn't writable by the web server. Make config.php writable (or ask your host), then save your key again.
